title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-04
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse checkup
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the greenhouse and updating app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily sync of community app metrics, health checks, and the greenhouse registry.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory and greenhouse statistics remain accurate and up-to-date.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as a gardener, checking on the greenhouse plants (representing apps), while Polly the bee takes notes on a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
